backward_compatibility.rationale: Additive feature — new URL params and filter options. Existing URLs without depth params work as 'no filter'. No migration needed.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: No old code to remove — this is a new feature addition, not a replacement.

option_selection.rationale: Unanimous governance approval. Minimal new files, reuses existing usePuzzleFilters/FilterBar/buildWhereClause patterns, meets all 11 AC, provides cross-filter count integration.
